title: Golf still thriving on the greens
description: GOLF NEWS - Last week saw great golf being...
bodyText:
GOLF NEWS - Last week saw great golf being played on the greens.


> The following results were achieved by enthusiastic players:


Individual Stableford Competition - 10 April

- First place - Deon Arnoldi - 36
- Second place - André Olivier - 28
- Third place - Dan Yeadon - 35

Betterball Competition - 13 April

- First place - Frans Booysen and Rowan George - 45
- Second place - Derek Helm and Bernie Weyer - 42
- Third place - John Luscombe and M Luscombe - 42
- Two Clubs - Patrick Ludick and Deon Arnoldi

Next competition dates:

- Individual Stableford - 17 April
- Sundowner Competition - 19 April
- TBA Competition - 20 April, tee-off 12:30

Frans Booysen, Derek Helm and Rowan George.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
